settings.heading: Shipping Policy
settings.description: Thank you for shopping at ROSHAS. We aim to provide a smooth, reliable delivery experience for all customers within Jordan.
settings.footer_contact_content: Should you have any questions about our shipping practices, please call or email us at laviniaperfumee@gmail.com or contact us at Amman, Amman, 11118, JO

settings.heading: Shipping Within Jordan
settings.content:
• Orders are processed and dispatched within 1–2 business days.
  • Standard delivery time is 1–3 business days, depending on location.
  • Delivery fees vary by area and will be shown at checkout.

settings.heading: Order Confirmation
settings.content: Once your order is placed, you will receive a confirmation email. A second notification will be sent when your order is out for delivery.

settings.heading: Cash on Delivery
settings.content: Cash on delivery may be available depending on your location. Please ensure accurate contact and address details to avoid delays.

settings.heading: Delivery Attempts
settings.content: If the courier is unable to reach you after multiple attempts, the order may be returned, and redelivery fees may apply.

settings.heading: Shipping Accuracy
settings.content: Customers are responsible for providing complete and correct delivery information. Incorrect details may result in delays or failed delivery.

settings.heading: Damaged or Wrong Items
settings.content: If your order arrives damaged, leaking, or incorrect, please contact us within 24–48 hours with photos so we can assist you.

settings.heading: International Shipping
settings.content: At this time, we currently ship within Jordan only. International shipping may be added in the future.
